description: Either a recursive sub-task list (Shape A) or clarifying questions (Shape B). Pick exactly one — the other field MUST be an empty array.

tasks.description: Shape A: ordered sub-tasks decomposing the parent. Empty array when emitting questions instead.

questions.description: Shape B: clarifying questions when the parent is structurally ambiguous. Empty array when emitting tasks instead.

suggestions.description: 2–4 short options describing distinct choices, concrete enough that picking one is unambiguous.

task.description: Plain prose — user-facing outcome first, constraints worth flagging after. No code, no framework names, no headings.

tasks.description: Optional deeper sub-tasks when the sub-task has internal phases worth naming. Empty array when none.

tasks.task: Stand up the responsive page shell so every later layer has somewhere to render. Centre the canvas and lock its aspect ratio.
Render the atmospheric layer (sun, clouds, ambient drift) as the static backdrop for the scene.
Define colour and timing tokens for the atmosphere.
Wire the cloud drift loop and respect reduced-motion.

examples.title: Asking clarifying questions (the parent is structurally ambiguous)

questions.question: Should the scene support light and dark modes, or pick one and ship that?
suggestions: Light only for this iteration; revisit dark in a later cycle.
Both modes plus an in-page toggle the user controls.
